next7Days.title: 鬼谜东宫
next7Days.summary: 一名游走于灵界的男子，与一位能听见亡者之声的宫女奉皇命进入东宫 — 他们能揭开其中的黑暗秘密吗？
next7Days.summaryEn: A man who walks the spirit world and a court lady who hears the dead enter the East Palace by the king's orders — can they unravel its dark secrets?

next7Days.title: 毛骨悚然的恋爱
next7Days.summary: 一位能看见鬼的酒店财阀女继承人，与被称为‘搜查之王’的热血感性检察官，两人之间横冲直撞的灵异联手破案罗曼史。改编自电影《我的见鬼女友》。
next7Days.summaryEn: When a ghost-seeing heir and an ace prosecutor learn that a single touch makes them a strangely effective duo, they team up to crack unsolved murders.

next7Days.title: 安昂传奇：最后的气宗
next7Days.summary: 派拉蒙和尼克宣布“降世神通”系列开发三部新的电影，仍是动画形式。第一部由《降世神通：最后的气宗》导演Lauren Montgomery执导，《最后的气宗》主创Bryan Konietzko和Michael DiMartino担任制片人。
next7Days.summaryEn: Avatar Aang, the world's last Airbender, learns of an ancient power that could save his culture from extinction. With the help of his friends, he embarks on a global quest to find it before it falls i

next30Days.title: 鬼谜东宫
next30Days.summary: 一名游走于灵界的男子，与一位能听见亡者之声的宫女奉皇命进入东宫 — 他们能揭开其中的黑暗秘密吗？
next30Days.summaryEn: A man who walks the spirit world and a court lady who hears the dead enter the East Palace by the king's orders — can they unravel its dark secrets?

next30Days.title: 毛骨悚然的恋爱
next30Days.summary: 一位能看见鬼的酒店财阀女继承人，与被称为‘搜查之王’的热血感性检察官，两人之间横冲直撞的灵异联手破案罗曼史。改编自电影《我的见鬼女友》。
next30Days.summaryEn: When a ghost-seeing heir and an ace prosecutor learn that a single touch makes them a strangely effective duo, they team up to crack unsolved murders.

next30Days.summary: 派拉蒙和尼克宣布“降世神通”系列开发三部新的电影，仍是动画形式。第一部由《降世神通：最后的气宗》导演Lauren Montgomery执导，《最后的气宗》主创Bryan Konietzko和Michael DiMartino担任制片人。
next30Days.summaryEn: Avatar Aang, the world's last Airbender, learns of an ancient power that could save his culture from extinction. With the help of his friends, he embarks on a global quest to find it before it falls i

next30Days.title: 爱情决胜点
next30Days.summary: 两位网球选手因父母间的世仇，多年来一直视彼此为宿敌。然而，在一次比赛中，他们被迫搭档组成双打组合。在并肩作战的过程中，两人内心深处隐藏的情感开始悄然浮出水面。
next30Days.summaryEn: When rival shop owners' sons Sun and Be are forced to play tennis doubles, hiding their secret team gets harder as real romance begins to bloom.

next30Days.title: 聪明镇
next30Days.summary: 在一座用严苛校规将学生塑造成 “完美模样” 的小镇里，生长着一棵隐秘的血果树，枝头结满赤红果实。一名神秘黑衣少年，只把果实赠予真正 “需要” 它的人。吃下果实后，人们被长久压抑的欲望尽数觉醒 —— 它温柔地叩开人心，也悄然将这座小镇推向无可挽回的覆灭。
next30Days.summaryEn: In a town where strict rules shape students into their “best selves,” a hidden Bloodfruit Tree bears crimson fruit. A mysterious boy in black delivers these fruits only to those who truly “need” them.

next30Days.title: 蜘蛛侠：崭新之日
next30Days.summary: 重建普通生活后，彼得一边在大学完成学业、一边从事兼职以维持生计，同时仍肩负着守护纽约街头的蜘蛛侠责任。然而，当一个神秘力量从内部腐蚀这座城市的安全与秩序，彼得被迫再次披上战衣。他必须在强大的敌人与昔日纽带之间找到平衡，并重新定义英雄的意义。
next30Days.summaryEn: Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn't remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter Parker he may not have the power to

next30Days.title: 我的偶像总裁
next30Days.summary: 新员工南多凛如愿以偿，进入由自己的偶像李灿创办的时尚公司“阿佩罗”。然而，当公司真正的CEO姜河基强势介入后，一场充满笑料的爱情三角纠葛就此展开。这部甜蜜搞笑的浪漫喜剧，讲述了超级粉丝在职场中与偶像及真正的老板之间碰撞出的火花与闹剧。
next30Days.summaryEn: A devoted fan unexpectedly joins the startup of her former idol crush and finds herself falling into a sweet, awkward romance with the company’s cool-headed CEO.

next30Days.title: 我的荒糖恋爱
next30Days.summary: 一名事业心十足的检察官失忆后，搬去和声称是自己男友的拳击教练同住。这段尴尬同居会发展成真爱吗？
next30Days.summaryEn: An ambitious prosecutor loses her memory and moves in with a boxing coach who claims to be her boyfriend. Can this sticky situation turn into real love?
